messages.content:
Produce your very own perspective on the given topic. Align tone and examples with the persona's background and traits. Focus on discussing your topic. Avoid bullet points. Produce continuous prose. Write at least 250 words, up to 500 words.

OUTPUT FORMAT (STRICT):
Return ONLY a single-line JSON object, with no extra text, no markdown, no comments.
No empty fields nor ... are allowed. Do not skip any field.
Here is the required structure example (values are placeholders):
{"mode":"human","topic":"What is the gender gap in science? Should we address it? And how?","persona":{"age":69,"gender":"woman","sexual_orientation":"heterosexual","occupation":"not applicable","city_of_living":"Philadelphia","employment_status":"unemployed","education_level":"upper secondary","parents_education":{"parent_1":"PhD","parent_2":"upper secondary"},"current_marital_status":"married","children":3,"migration_status":"native-born American","psychological_feature":"curious","religious_beliefs":"Islam","time_onsocialmedia":"You spend roughly a few times weekly on social media","hobbies":["cycling","gardening","running"],"ocean":{"openness":{"score":72,"level":"high"},"conscientiousness":{"score":84,"level":"high"},"extraversion":{"score":58,"level":"moderate"},"agreeableness":{"score":19,"level":"low"},"neuroticism":{"score":14,"level":"low"}}},"opinion":"<final end-user facing answer, 250-500 words>","reasoning_summary":"<full,step-by-step derivations>","tone":"<derived from persona traits>","citations":["<source name or org>"],"safety_notes":"<none>","used_persona_fields":["<list of persona fields referenced>"]}
